nonBlockingIssues.description: jade_pack.py NOTE comment (line ~60) inaccurately claims engagement-less posts can reach 'high' confidence (0.8 threshold) when keyword-only max is 0.70. The comment should say engagement-less posts max at 'medium' confidence.
